hooks.command: COUNT_FILE=/tmp/claude_edit_count; count=$(cat "$COUNT_FILE" 2>/dev/null || echo 0); count=$((count + 1)); echo $count > "$COUNT_FILE"; if [ "$count" -ge 10 ]; then echo 0 > "$COUNT_FILE"; cd /var/www/harness && git add -A && git commit -m "Auto-commit after 10 changes" && git push; fi
